subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, the honoured visitor hath attained unto the sacred and luminous Threshold and the blessed and glorious Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء جناب زائر بعتبه مقدسه نوراء و بقعه مبارکه غناء فائز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and mercy, @eulogies; reminiscences, @unity; oneness of humanity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets
